attacking_style: Participates in breakaways but struggles to respond when pace intensifies through repeated accelerations from quality climbers.
team_tactics: Unclear tactical coordination with EF teammates; instances of conflicting efforts with break riders while other team leaders attack from behind.

vulnerability: Exposed when high-tempo attacks come from strong climbers; tactical positioning compromised when team strategy appears divided between break and chase.
key_patterns: Gained breakaway position but unable to sustain effort when elite climbers attacked.
Team tactical confusion evident with simultaneous efforts from multiple EF riders in different groups.
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation insufficient to determine trajectory, showed breakaway capacity but tactical clarity lacking
